expectations.text: Text and background colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1
expectations.evidence: Background (#0f172a) and text (#e2e8f0) have a contrast ratio of ~12:1 inside the inline <style> block, which safely exceeds the WCAG AA threshold of 4.5:1.

expectations.text: Heading top padding satisfies the dynamic formula against the peripheral offset and font size to avoid overlap
expectations.evidence: Heading top padding (40px) is larger than peripheral offset (12px) + font size (11px) * line height (1.2) = 25.2px. This provides a safety margin of 14.8px, preventing overlap.

expectations.text: Compact sizing scale (fonts and gaps) is applied for high content density slides
expectations.evidence: Compact variables (size-1: 44px, gap-3: 16px) were correctly configured to scale down typography and spacing for high density.

expectations.text: Matrix colors are derived from base colors using relative color syntax
expectations.evidence: All secondary variables such as base soft colors and card backgrounds are derived cleanly from base colors using CSS Relative Color Syntax (e.g. rgba(from var(--hd-theme-text-color) r g b / 0.08)).

expectations.text: The html-deck module is loaded via unpkg.com with version 1.0.0-alpha.2
